functions.name: Subscription without unsubscribe
functions.description: Always unsubscribe from observables to prevent memory leaks. Use takeUntilDestroyed or unsubscribe.

recommendation.title: Unsubscribe from observables
recommendation.description: Always unsubscribe from observables to prevent memory leaks. Use takeUntilDestroyed or unsubscribe.

action.message: Observable subscription without unsubscribe - will cause memory leak

functions.name: Manual change detection
functions.description: Manual change detection can cause performance issues. Use OnPush and async pipe.

recommendation.title: Avoid manual change detection
recommendation.description: Manual change detection can cause performance issues. Use OnPush and async pipe.

action.message: Manual change detection - use OnPush and async pipe instead

functions.name: Method call in template
functions.description: Method calls in templates run on every change detection. Use pipes or computed properties.

recommendation.title: Avoid method calls in templates
recommendation.description: Method calls in templates run on every change detection. Use pipes or computed properties.

action.message: Method call in template - runs on every change detection

functions.name: Impure pipe with expensive computation
functions.description: Pipes should be pure by default for performance.

recommendation.title: Mark pure pipes
recommendation.description: Pipes should be pure by default for performance.

action.message: Impure pipe runs on every change detection - make pure if possible
